name: market-breadth
prompt: Use the market-breadth-analyzer / breadth-chart-analyst approach to produce today's US market breadth read. Write a concise dated briefing to ~/work/notes/breadth-<date>.md.

name: news-digest
prompt: Produce a market & tech news digest of the last 12h with why-it-matters notes. Write to ~/work/notes/news-<date>.md.

name: repo-readme-sweep
prompt: Find one repo under ~/work that lacks a good README, study it, and write a capability-first README.md for it. Report which repo you chose and what you wrote.

name: deep-research-queue
prompt: Pick the next unresearched topic from ~/work/notes/research-topics.txt (create it with a few topics if missing), do a multi-source deep dive, and write a cited report to ~/work/notes/research/<slug>.md.
